name: Bohemian Beef Dinner
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds beef stew meat, cut into 1-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl or plastic bag, combine flour, salt and pepper. Add beef; dredge or shake to coat.
2. In a Dutch oven, brown the beef, half at a time, in oil; drain.
3. Add onions, garlic, dill, caraway, paprika and water. Cover and simmer for 2 hours or until meat is tender, stirring occasionally.
4. Stir in sour cream; heat through but do not boil.
5. Heat sauerkraut; drain and spoon onto a serving platter.
6. Top with the beef mixture.
7. Sprinkle with paprika.
